subject: Acme pilot next steps
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Jane,

I’ll send the security packet by Friday, May 22. We’ll confirm the NetSuite integration scope with product before adding it to the pilot plan. Live external emails will remain disabled unless Acme approves a separate go-live step.

Best,
Alex

intendedClaims.text: We’ll confirm the NetSuite integration scope with product before adding it to the pilot plan.
Live external emails will remain disabled unless Acme approves a separate go-live step.
